Furthermore, even within data centers themselves, as they scale to 5–6 GW and the footprint of roughly 10 Pentagons, coherent optics will be required for internal communication at those distances. The investment implication is that coherent optical networking companies face a structural, durable demand tailwind driven by physics and infrastructure scale, not by discretionary spending cycles. Baker frames this as a near-certain outcome with no engineering alternative, making optical networking suppliers direct beneficiaries of AI infrastructure buildout.
